---
title: "CCAMLR State of the Environment Reporting: Fisheries"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
date: "2026-02-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(highcharter)
library(here)
library(htmltools)
```

<!-- Load data -->
```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
ds <- read_csv(here("data", "ccamlr_processed_data.csv"))
year_min <- min(ds$season_ccamlr, na.rm = TRUE)
year_max <- max(ds$season_ccamlr, na.rm = TRUE)
```

<!-- Build summary data -->
```{r build_data, include=FALSE}
taxa  <- c("TOA", "TOP", "ANI", "KRI")
areas <- c("48", "58", "88")

ds_catch_summary <- ds %>%
  filter(
    taxon_code %in% taxa,
    area_code %in% areas
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    season_ccamlr,
    taxon_vernacular_name,
    taxon_scientific_name,
    taxon_code,
    area_code
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    catch_tonne = sum(greenweight_caught_tonne, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    season_ccamlr = as.integer(season_ccamlr),
    catch_tonne = round(catch_tonne, 0)
  )

ds_sub_area_catch_summary <- ds %>%
  filter(
    taxon_code %in% taxa,
    !asd_type %in% "Area"
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    season_ccamlr,
    taxon_vernacular_name,
    taxon_scientific_name,
    taxon_code,
    asd_subarea_code
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    catch_tonne = sum(greenweight_caught_tonne, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    season_ccamlr = as.integer(season_ccamlr),
    catch_tonne = round(catch_tonne, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

effort <- ds %>%
  filter(
    effort_or_catch == "effort",
    area_code %in% areas
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    target_species_code = trimws(target_species_code)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(target_species_code),
    target_species_code != "",
    target_species_code %in% taxa
  ) %>%
  group_by(season_ccamlr, target_species_code, area_code) %>%
  summarise(
    vessel_count = sum(vessel_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(season_ccamlr = as.integer(season_ccamlr))
```

<!-- Plotting functions -->
```{r charts_area, echo=FALSE}


make_taxon_widget_generic <- function(ds_one, group_col, legend_title, show_legend = TRUE) {

  ver <- ds_one$taxon_vernacular_name[1]
  sci <- ds_one$taxon_scientific_name[1]
  title_txt <- paste(ver, sci, sep = " — ")


  hc <- hchart(
    ds_one,
    type = "column",
    hcaes(x = season_ccamlr, y = catch_tonne, group = .data[[group_col]])
  ) %>%
    hc_chart(zoomType = "x", panning = TRUE, panKey = "shift") %>%
    hc_plotOptions(column = list(stacking = "normal")) %>%
    hc_xAxis(
      title = list(text = "Season CCAMLR"),
      min = year_min,
      max = year_max,
      tickInterval = 5
    ) %>%
    hc_yAxis(title = list(text = "Catch (tonnes)")) %>%
    hc_title(text = title_txt) %>%
    hc_tooltip(shared = TRUE)

  if (show_legend) {
    hc <- hc %>% hc_legend(
      enabled = TRUE,
      title = list(text = legend_title),
      align = "center",
      verticalAlign = "bottom",
      layout = "horizontal"
    )
  } else {
    hc <- hc %>% hc_legend(enabled = FALSE)
  }

  hc
}

make_taxon_widget_area <- function(ds_one) {
  make_taxon_widget_generic(
    ds_one,
    group_col = "area_code",
    legend_title = "Statistical Area",
    show_legend = TRUE
  )
}

make_taxon_widget_area_effort <- function(ds_catch_area, ds_effort_area, area_code_one) {

  ds_plot <- ds_catch_area %>%
    left_join(
      ds_effort_area,
      by = c(
        "season_ccamlr" = "season_ccamlr",
        "area_code"     = "area_code",
        "taxon_code"    = "target_species_code"
      )
    ) %>%
    mutate(season_ccamlr = as.integer(season_ccamlr)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(season_ccamlr)) %>%
    distinct(season_ccamlr, area_code, taxon_code, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    arrange(season_ccamlr)

  ver <- ds_plot$taxon_vernacular_name[1]
  sci <- ds_plot$taxon_scientific_name[1]

  vmax <- suppressWarnings(max(ds_plot$vessel_count, na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(vmax)) vmax <- 0
  vessel_ymax <- if (vmax > 100) ceiling(vmax / 10) * 10 else 100

  highchart() %>%
    hc_chart(zoomType = "x", panning = TRUE, panKey = "shift") %>%
    hc_add_series(
      data = ds_plot,
      type = "column",
      hcaes(x = season_ccamlr, y = catch_tonne),
      name = "Catch (t)",
      yAxis = 0
    ) %>%
    hc_add_series(
      data = ds_plot,
      type = "line",
      hcaes(x = season_ccamlr, y = vessel_count),
      name = "Vessel count",
      yAxis = 1,
      marker = list(enabled = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    hc_plotOptions(
      column = list(groupPadding = 0.05, pointPadding = 0, borderWidth = 0)
    ) %>%
    hc_yAxis_multiples(
      list(title = list(text = "Catch (tonnes)")),
      list(
        min = 0,
        max = vessel_ymax,
        opposite = TRUE,
        title = list(text = "Vessel count", rotation = 270)
      )
    ) %>%
    hc_xAxis(
      title = list(text = "Season CCAMLR"),
      min = year_min,
      max = year_max,
      tickInterval = 5
    ) %>%
    hc_title(text = paste0(ver, " - ", sci, " — Area ", area_code_one)) %>%
    hc_tooltip(shared = TRUE)
}

sections <- lapply(taxa, function(tx) {

  ds_area <- ds_catch_summary %>%
    filter(taxon_code == tx, catch_tonne > 0) %>%
    arrange(season_ccamlr, area_code)

  area_block <- NULL
  if (nrow(ds_area) > 0) {
    area_block <- tagList(make_taxon_widget_area(ds_area), tags$br())
  }

  ds_eff_tx <- effort %>%
    filter(target_species_code == tx, area_code %in% areas) %>%
    arrange(season_ccamlr, area_code)

  area_effort_plots <- lapply(areas, function(ar) {

  ds_catch_ar <- ds_catch_summary %>%
    filter(taxon_code == tx, area_code == ar) %>%
    filter(!is.na(season_ccamlr)) %>%
    arrange(season_ccamlr)
  
  ds_eff_ar <- ds_eff_tx %>%
    filter(area_code == ar) %>%
    filter(!is.na(season_ccamlr)) %>%
    arrange(season_ccamlr)
  
  # if there isn't any data, don't plot ---> skip plot
  if (nrow(ds_catch_ar) == 0 && nrow(ds_eff_ar) == 0) return(NULL)
  

  if (nrow(ds_eff_ar) == 0) return(NULL)

    make_taxon_widget_area_effort(ds_catch_ar, ds_eff_ar, area_code_one = ar)
  })

  area_effort_plots <- Filter(Negate(is.null), area_effort_plots)

  area_effort_block <- NULL
  if (length(area_effort_plots) > 0) {
    area_effort_block <- tagList(area_effort_plots, tags$br())
  }

  ds_sub <- ds_sub_area_catch_summary %>%
    filter(taxon_code == tx) %>%
    arrange(season_ccamlr, asd_subarea_code)

  sub_block <- NULL
  if (nrow(ds_sub) > 0) {

    subareas <- sort(unique(ds_sub$asd_subarea_code))

    sub_plots <- lapply(subareas, function(sa) {
    
      ds_one <- ds_sub %>%
        filter(asd_subarea_code == sa) %>%
        mutate(.legend_one = paste0("Subarea ", sa)) %>%
        filter(!is.na(season_ccamlr)) %>%      # <- ADD THIS
        arrange(season_ccamlr)                # <- AND THIS
    
      if (nrow(ds_one) == 0) return(NULL)

      if (all(is.na(ds_one$catch_tonne)) || sum(ds_one$catch_tonne, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) return(NULL)
    
      ver <- ds_one$taxon_vernacular_name[1]
      sci <- ds_one$taxon_scientific_name[1]
    
      make_taxon_widget_generic(
        ds_one,
        group_col = ".legend_one",  # or NULL if you remove grouping
        legend_title = "Subarea",
        show_legend = FALSE
      ) %>%
        hc_title(text = paste(ver, "-", sci, "— Subarea", sa))
    })

    sub_plots <- Filter(Negate(is.null), sub_plots)

    if (length(sub_plots) > 0) {
      sub_block <- tagList(sub_plots, tags$br())
    }
  }

  if (is.null(area_block) && is.null(area_effort_block) && is.null(sub_block)) return(NULL)

  tagList(
    area_block,
    area_effort_block,
    sub_block,
    tags$hr()
  )
})

browsable(tagList(sections))

```
